zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD报1988.83美元，24小时微涨0.46%，价格运行于日内区间1979.71至1990.47美元附近。从走势看，价格仍处于窄幅震荡格局，反弹力度有限，短线呈现偏弱整理特征，市场观望情绪较为明显。

均线方面，现价低于20日简单移动平均线1993.06美元，说明短期趋势仍略偏空。MACD数值为-8.98，处于零轴下方，显示空头动能尚未完全消退。不过价格跌幅有限，表明卖压正在逐步减弱，后续需关注动能变化。

关键支撑位位于1980美元附近，对应日内低点区域，若失守则可能进一步下探1965美元至1970美元区间。上方阻力首先关注1993美元均线位置，其次是2000美元整数关口，突破后有望打开向2020美元附近的反弹空间。

操作策略上，短线交易者可关注1980美元支撑区域的企稳表现，采用低吸高抛思路；激进者可等待价格有效突破2000美元后顺势跟进。若价格跌破1980美元并放量下行，则应控制仓位，防范进一步回调风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1988.83, holding near the upper end of the recent intraday range between 1979.71 and 1990.47. Price remains slightly below the 20-period simple moving average at 1993.06, suggesting that short-term momentum is still mildly bearish despite the modest 0.46% daily gain. The market appears to be consolidating after recent weakness, with buyers attempting to stabilize price action around the 1980–1990 zone rather than establishing a clear upward trend.

The moving average configuration indicates that Ethereum has not yet regained full bullish control. Trading below the SMA(20) often reflects lingering selling pressure, although the narrow gap between price and the average suggests that sentiment could shift quickly if buyers push above resistance. Meanwhile, the MACD value of -8.98 points to negative momentum remaining in the market. Without a confirmed signal-line reading, the indicator still implies that bearish forces have not completely faded and caution remains warranted.

Key support is located near the session low around 1979.70, followed by a stronger psychological support area near 1970. A break below these levels could expose additional downside toward the 1950 region. On the upside, immediate resistance is evident around 1990–1993, where price meets both recent highs and the 20-period moving average. A sustained move above this zone would improve the technical outlook and open the door for a test of the 2000 psychological barrier and potentially higher levels.

From a trading perspective, conservative participants may prefer to wait for a confirmed breakout above 1993 before considering bullish positions, as this would signal improving momentum and trend strength. More aggressive traders could look for short-term buying opportunities near support around 1980 with tight risk controls. Conversely, failure to hold above support may favor short-side strategies targeting lower support zones. Risk management remains essential while Ethereum trades within this relatively tight consolidation range.
